ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent to which the country belongs */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country's currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time when the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_survey" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "quantile" INTEGER /* Quantile number of the data */,
  "nb_quantiles" INTEGER /* Total number of quantiles */,
  "income" REAL /* Income value for the quantile */,
  "gdpppp" REAL /* GDP per capita for the country */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time when the dataset was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_survey FOREIGN KEY ("year_survey") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_quantile FOREIGN KEY ("quantile") REFERENCES quantiles ("quantile_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantiles" (
  "quantile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantile */,
  "quantile_number" INTEGER /* Number of the quantile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quantile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quantile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time when the quantile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the year entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time when the year entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the income data belongs to */,
  "income_value" REAL /* Value of the income */,
  "income_type" TEXT /* Type of income (e.g., GDP per capita) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the income data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the income data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the income data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time when the income data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* User's position or role within the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time when the user account was updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time when the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
